subject: Accounting
title: Who Are Accountants?
description: Learn Who Are Accountants? in one minute.

hook.text: Forget the stereotype of a boring number-cruncher. Modern accountants advise CEOs.

buildup.text: CPAs, auditors, tax experts, forensic investigators—accounting has many paths.

discovery.text: Forensic accountants helped catch Al Capone. The IRS found tax fraud, not murder evidence.

twist.text: Today's accountants use AI and data analytics more than paper and calculators.

climax.text: The profession spans every industry—from Hollywood studios to hospital chains.

punchline.text: Accountants don't just count beans. They run the show.

quiz.question: How was Al Capone ultimately convicted?
